name: l2_powered_source_request_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceRequestReadinessGate blocks powered-source request execution until API acceptance and envelope checks are all ready.
note: Execution gate for future A4MC powered source requests.

name: l2_powered_source_request_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceRequestPlan packages hover and cruise source-map targets with static L2 request geometry.
note: Request envelopes checked by this readiness gate.

name: l2_powered_hover_acceptance_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverAcceptanceGate defines the hover powered-source evidence gate.
note: Hover acceptance must be open before request execution.

name: l2_powered_cruise_acceptance_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseAcceptanceGate defines the cruise powered-source evidence gate.
note: Cruise acceptance must be open before request execution.

name: l2_bridge
value: Aerodynamics4McL2Bridge can build static L2 force moment requests but currently has no powered source-term request surface.
note: Current bridge capability boundary for powered source requests.

name: l2_powered_source_api_surface_audit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceApiSurfaceAudit supplies the public A4MC L2 powered-source API surface readiness used by this gate.
note: Global powered-source API surface input; a manual boolean cannot open request execution without this audit.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future powered body-force or porous-source request support.
note: Upstream CFD target for future powered source support.
